name: Oven-Roasted Potatoes & Zucchini with Garlic
recipeIngredient: 2 sprigs fresh rosemary or 1 tbsp dried rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cut potatoes and zucchini into 1-inch-long chunks, 1/2-inch thick. Place zucchini in a bowl and cover with plastic wrap; set aside.
3. Mince garlic, rosemary (or dried rosemary), and sea salt until the mixture is almost a paste.
4. Combine the garlic paste with olive oil in a 14-by-9-inch baking dish. Add potatoes and coat well with the mixture.
5. Roast for 30 to 35 minutes, turning the potatoes once or twice with a metal spatula during roasting.
6. Add zucchini to the baking dish and toss the vegetables well.
7. Return the pan to the oven and roast for another 20 to 25 minutes, or until the zucchini is soft but not mushy and the potatoes are golden brown. Sprinkle with pepper and serve immediately. Makes 4 servings.
